item.title: İskender Kebab (at home version) Ingredients For the beef: -G...
item.description:
İskender Kebab (at home version) Ingredients For the beef: -Ground beef and/or lamb -White onion -Full fat yogurt -Aleppo pepper or red pepper flakes -Cumin -Paprika -Dried oregano -Cinnamon -Salt -Black pepper -Butter for cooking For the tomato sauce -Butter -Tomato paste -Passata -Smoked paprika -Sugar -Salt -Black pepper For the Aleppo brown butter -Unsalted butter (or salted up to you but adjust salt accordingly!) -Aleppo pepper For serving -Soft fresh pide bread or other similar bread -Plain full fat yogurt -Long green pepper or Cubanelle pepper
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED
